calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Carlos Moran.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Renee Watkins is present.
Attorney Dmitri Pikman representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge James McBride, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 220, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
